text:
Fan Lyrics:

Journey's over
I sit down on the fields and look
The sky's great
And I had just won the league

Looking back at my journey
It was sure
Filled of laughter, tears and
Anger, scares and joyous moments

My first mon
And my first badges I got
My first wins
And of course my first losses

It's so hard to think
I sucked a lot
But I'm not the best in the world
Nor I'm the worst in here

Now
What I'm going to do?
Journey on?
Or keep battling?

One thing I know
Looking at my rivals
I'd do this over again
With my team beside me

The journey was a bore and very tiring
But stuff along the way was very fun
I'd do this again with my friends
But never make the same mistakes

Now journey's over
But life isn't over
I look forward to
What futures bring
author: @meanshape101

text: Wow thanks for the song! as far as i know this is the only time anyone put the end credits song on youtube!
